race.comment: The feature race on the card, the $100,000 Newmarket. GLASS OF ROSE (14) wasn't disgraced in Listed company last time out and should find this assignment much more to her liking. Gets in on the minimum weight and will be cherry-ripe fit for this. Just needs some luck from the sticky draw to trouble the judge. OUROBOROS (2) has placed three of four this preparation and looks to be working up to another win. Another who has drawn poorly but is more than capable on his day. Shouldn't be underestimated. BOLD COMIC (11) loves it here at Rockhampton with three wins and a second from just five spins. High on confidence following that last-start win here and Cartwright sticks. In the mix. SHA OF GOMER (1) wasn't too far away in Listed grade last start and looks one for the multiples. DON PEDRO (7) best of the rest.
